title: centaurea sphaerocephala
intro: Centaurea sphaerocephala, also known as Red Knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Centaurea sphaerocephala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
